title: Sterling Hershey
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:Sterling_hershey.jpg]]
|name=Sterling Hershey
|birth=
|death=
|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->

A full-time architect and game designer, '''Sterling Hershey ''' worked on every incarnation of the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] for [[West End Games]], [[Wizards of the Coast]] and [[Fantasy Flight Games]]. During this time he was also a participant in the [[FidoNet Star Wars Echo]].

His screen name is SilverForce on both StarWars.com<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|listing=true|silverforce|Delusions of Grandeur|Sterling Hershey}}</ref> and the [http://forums.gleemax.com/member.php?u=398094 Wizards boards].

At GenCon in [[2012]], it was announced that he was one of the designers of [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' new ''Star Wars''–themed [[roleplaying game]], ''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire]]'', and revealed on his blog the names of two sequels: [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion|''Age of Rebellion'']] in [[2014]] and [[Star Wars: Force & Destiny|''Force & Destiny'']] in [[2015]].<ref name="Beta Announced">{{WebCite|url=http://www.sterlinghershey.com/blog/2012/8/22/star-wars-wednesday-swrpg-edge-of-the-empire-beta-announced.html|text=Star Wars Wednesday - SWRPG: Edge of the Empire Beta Announced!|archivedate=20160401155951}}</ref>

However, on [[June 6]], [[2013]], he announced on his website the completion and upcoming release of the first direct expansion of the game, ''[[Beyond the Rim]]'', ''Edge of the Empire''{{'s}} first full-length adventure, scheduled for release in the third quarter of 2013.<ref name="blog">{{WebCite|url=http://www.sterlinghershey.com/blog/2013/6/6/star-wars-beyond-the-rim.html|text="Star Wars Beyond The Rim" (Thursday, June 6, 2013, 7:08PM)|archivedate=20160313112640}}</ref>

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Books===
*''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' - April 1995
*''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'' - June 1995
*''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]'' - September 1996
*''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]'' - March 1998
*''[[The Kathol Rift]]'' - May 1996
*''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'' - April 1998 (cartographer)
*''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' - August 2008
*''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' - September 2008
*''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' - March 2009
*''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' - July 2009
*''[[Scavenger's Guide to Droids]]'' - November 2009
*''[[The Unknown Regions]]'' - April 2010
*''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Beginner Game]]'' - 2012
*[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] - July 2013
